column1: Hey Kerin, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi Spiffy! My two friends and I are interested in going to Punta Cana for Spring break March 13-21
That's the week of our spring break but we'd probably only go for around 4 nights
Cool I got you! I'll be in Punta Cana too will be dope to have y'all there
how many ppl in your group so far?
littttt, gonna be a good time for sure
we go to the university of rhode island!
Wild. I still live in newport lol
i like just turned 21 lol so i haven't gone to newport bars but ive been to dockside for formal
Docksidee. thats wassup, I run events there
not sure if you've heard of Newport Nightlife
no way!! i've heard of it but never used it
what are your options for punta cana for the week we're going?
yeaa gonna put this info together for you rn! how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
perfect thank you!! lowkey like as soon as possible
yea lets do it. I'll hook it up with a deal and add the payment plan to it. helps spread things up a little into a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
also can the three of us pay separately or does it have to be on one card?
nah you each get to make your own payments!
whats the best email for you? I'll send this over
bet! will send in a few minutes
just sent that over lmk if you got it
added a free booze cruise deal in there for y'all
wait that's fire thank u sm
ofc! lmk what the squad thinks. any questions they have I got you just text me
I can help you find a good flight to buy too. its cheapest to get those separately on your own rather than in one package
ok perfect ya that's what we were thinking too
to get the free booze cruise we'd have to pay $200 by tomorrow?
yea lowkey that was our new years deal but I slid it on there for y'all
do you have any options for the bahamas?
yea we do! a little more expensive than Punta but its a vibe too
wait perfect could you possibly send me options for the bahamas?
so here's what bahamas looks like https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/TS4LY6YJ1K

The VIP one you'll see is just the one that includes the 3 night party pass + booze cruise. for bahamas the payment plan is pay in full upon booking. this one I can't include the payment plan option unfort
ok perfect sorry me and my friends have been looking through everything
i think we're gonna go with the bahamas
do we just book it on the link u sent
I'm gonna make you a new fresh reservation specific for y'all. which set of nights did we wanna do? March 13-17 March 14-18 March 15-19
wordd dope, I'll send it over in 10 min
are there clubs at this resort or just bars? also are the bars in the resort or is it off the resort cause it says 5 min walk
yea theres a nightclub on the resort. its nothing crazy by any means but its a little spot and can get packed
I just sent that reservation over btw
wait i'm probs being stupid but the link won't let me register
both my friends were able to put their info in but when i click join trip it doesn't work
ok yes i got it now
when i click buy add ons there's no options for a party pack
nah not in that one, I would have to set up the VIP package instead. did you want that one instead?
the option I sent was the base one
oh yes we def want the VIP package then
lets do it. all good. gonna send over the new link. will transfer your accounts over to it
is it ok if we lowkey book it tomorrow?
sending a new link now, I may have to have y'all re make your accounts if thats cool
and did ppl need more time?
ya that's fine we're about to get ready and go out so if u send the link tn will it be ok if we book it tomorrow
we're actually gonna do it rn sorry for being so back and forth lol
we just booked it! thanks sm for all ur help!!
Yo! Okay dope np, glad I could help

hi spiffy! julianna got a new passport because hers was gonna expire and the website won't let her update her passport number. Is it gonna cause issues if her new passport doesn't match up with the one on the website?
Should be fine! whats her new passport number tho I'll update it
ok perfect she'll text it to you tonight
also do we need like a confirmation email from the hotel to check in? because we don't have anything from the hotel
Nah you're gonna be greeted by our onsite staff as soon as you get there and they're gonna help you with check in
You'll have vouchers in your account soon that you'll use to redeem any party passes or add ons you purchased as well
I would screenshot all of your vouchers so you have them handy and ready to show if needed
You'll get an email when those are ready if you haven't already
ok perfect thank you! also do u know if the booze cruise is apart of our party pack? and do you know if its during the day or at night?
The booze cruise is separate I can check your account to see if you have it. Booze cruise is a day time vibe. I'll send a few vids over
hey sorry i just saw ur email and in it it says we're going to cancun but our trip is for the bahamas
yo my bad lol! sending you the correct one rn!
hello! we just got our vouchers but we don't have vouchers for our party pack or the booze cruise which we payed extra for
hey hey. yea you have the VIP booking voucher. VIP comes with the party pack automatically
